title: ruagea subviridiflora
intro: Ruagea subviridiflora, commonly known as the "Corynanthe" plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a type of medicinal plant that has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to its numerous health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The therapeutic actions of Ruagea subviridiflora include pain relief, wound healing, and the treatment of fever, among others. The plant is rich in bioactive constituents, including alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties and potential health benefits.
